scope: Battle Command map-selection inspector comparison cards for selected-brigade order transfers
steps: Opened the local app at the strategic map.
Clicked `幕舎で準備する`, `出撃配置へ`, and `選抜部隊で戦闘開始`, waiting about 3 seconds after each action.
Ran the battle at `3倍` until enemy groups spawned, clicked `停止`, and selected a visible enemy map token.
Verified the map-selection inspector showed comparison cards for enemy-front, frontline-transfer, and facility-near candidates.
Verified the existing action buttons remained visible: `敵前縁へ布陣`, `選択旅団を戦線へ`, and `施設近接へ基準`.
Clicked `敵前縁へ布陣` and verified the selected brigade command summary updated anchor/fallback and pending command transmission.

sampleScores: 比較 敵前縁 評価68 距離27 / 後退余地16 / 目標指名可
比較 戦線転属 評価93 距離1 / 敵圧0 / 守備2+予備1
比較 施設近接 評価80 距離11 / 耐久89 / 脅威0
verified.orderButtonStillWorks: After `敵前縁へ布陣`, selected command summary showed anchor `X42 Y49`, fallback `X26 Y49`, and pending `伝令 3秒 / 集中射撃`.

notes: Comparison cards are advisory only. They do not add BattleState or save fields.
Mobile/cellphone QA remains outside the current target.
